Off Calendar Aug-02-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
